## Type of Change

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest` passes locally (`pytest`)
- [ ] Linting passes (`ruff check ros2_agent tests`)
- [ ] New/changed behaviour is covered by tests
- [ ] Mock data in `ros2_agent/ros2/mock.py` updated if adding a new tool
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (under `[Unreleased]`)
- [ ] `.env.example` updated if adding a new config option
